rulings.Case Title: ZHI HONG KUANG VS. BAO QIANG PAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 27, 2018 line . DEFENDANT BAO PAN, XI WU, SI WU, JUM GUO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address: (1) Propriety of taking judicial notice of redacted documents. Specifically Notice of Intent to Withdraw with blacked-out portions. Defendant to cite authority for judicial notice of such documents; (2) Assuming RJN of Notice of Intent to Withdraw is Taken, should the description of the "Property" to be withdrawn from the rental market be "3839 Moraga Street" as opposed to "3839 Moraga Street, Lower Unit." Plaintiff to provide authority; (3) if 120th day from the service of Notice of Intent to Withdraw falls on a weekend or legal holiday, does the withdrawal date fall on the next business day. Both sides to provide authority; (4) whether Request for Rescission of Ellis Eviction Notices a mandatory form and the only legally appropriate method of withdrawing a Notice of Intent to Withdraw/Notice of Termination of Tenancy. Both sides to provide authority. Authorities (no further argument; only copies of relevant code sections and cases) to be exchanged with opposing side and provided to the Court in advance of the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PACIENCIA T. DELA CRUZ VS. DARCY RAVEN
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 27, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT DARCY RAVEN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Allegations in the complaint are taken as true for the purposes of ruling on the demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IDA IBARRA VS. ILIAN AYALA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 27, 2018 line 8. DEFENDANT NANCY AYALA, ILIAN AYALA, DANIEL HERNANDEZ, JOSE AYALA, BRITTANY RODRIGUEZ DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff's notice is fatally defective. Plaintiff failed to state "the current rent for the unit" as required per SFRO 37.9B(c)(5) and failed to file opposition to this argument in the demurrer. Additionally, Plaintiff failed to cite any authority that providing incorrect information in the Notice of Termination of Tenancy is "inconsequential." Finally, Plaintiff failed to suggest that a good faith amendment is possible, specifically that Plaintiff can allege in good faith that all of the required information per Regulation 12.14 was provided in writing to Defendant "on or before service of the notice to vacate." = (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 27, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER PARRISH MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Paragraphs 12 and 17(g) are stricken. Defendant to prepare order and file answer to the Complaint, paragraphs 12 and 17(g) having been stricken. = (501/REQ)
